division_title: PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES
chapter_title: Disposition of Fees, Fines, and Forfeitures
text: Fines, forfeitures, and deposits of bail collected as a result of a charge or conviction of an infraction shall be deposited and distributed in the same manner as fines, forfeitures, and deposits of bail collected from a person charged with or convicted of a misdemeanor.
markdown:
# Vehicle Code
## Division 18. PENALTIES AND DISPOSITION OF FEES, FINES, AND FORFEITURES [42000 - 42277]
### Chapter 2. Disposition of Fees, Fines, and Forfeitures [42200 - 42240]
#### Article 1. Fines and Forfeitures [42200 - 42205]
##### § 42201.5

Fines, forfeitures, and deposits of bail collected as a result of a charge or conviction of an infraction shall be deposited and distributed in the same manner as fines, forfeitures, and deposits of bail collected from a person charged with or convicted of a misdemeanor.

*(Added by Stats. 1968, Ch. 1192.)*

subsections.text: Fines, forfeitures, and deposits of bail collected as a result of a charge or conviction of an infraction shall be deposited and distributed in the same manner as fines, forfeitures, and deposits of bail collected from a person charged with or convicted of a misdemeanor.
